author: cofuente
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Automatically copies highlighted text to the clipboard when the selection changes, mirroring Linux primary-selection behavior.

manifest.author: Chiara Marcial Martínez
manifest.description: Automatically copies highlighted text to the clipboard when the selection changes, mirroring Linux primary-selection behavior.
manifest.name: Copy on Selection

name: Copy on Selection

releases.author: cofuente
releases.description:
Auto-copies highlighted text to the clipboard on selection change.
Desktop-only for v0.1; mobile support is deferred pending testing.
See the README for settings and known limitations.
releases.name: Initial release of Copy on Selection.
